## How was it tested?

<!-- Commands run, OS tested on. For CLI changes, `npm run lint && npm run build && npm run smoke` in packages/cli must pass. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `tsc --noEmit` passes in the package(s) I touched
- [ ] The CLI smoke test passes locally (`npm run smoke` in `packages/cli`) for daemon/revert changes
- [ ] User-facing error messages are actionable (say what to run next)
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behavior changed
